meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no project ideas (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no project ideas. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Solve Founder Ideation Block
content.seo_description: Break through ideation gridlock with our Antigravity project template. An advanced checklist for Founders using Claude Code to build profitable SaaS apps.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template bridges the gap between abstract concepts and production-ready code. By leveraging iterative architecture prompts and automated scaffolding, Founders can bypass the 'blank canvas' paralysis, instantly generating monetizable SaaS foundations that are ready for deployment and rapid market validation.
content.intro:
The silent killer of startups isn't a bad pivot or a buggy backend; it is the paralyzing void of the blank IDE screen. You have the vision for a high-margin product, but the sheer friction of architectural scaffolding keeps you trapped in the ideation phase, watching competitors capture your market share while you struggle to initialize your first commit.

Today, we shatter that stagnation. By integrating the Antigravity project template with the raw power of Claude Code, you transition from 'thinking about a project' to 'shipping a prototype' in minutes. This isn't just about writing code—it's about deploying a business engine designed for speed, scale, and revenue.

steps.title: Define the Value Proposition Canvas
steps.description: Before writing code, formalize your SaaS business logic to ensure the AI generates a product that solves a real, paid problem.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a CTO. Generate a project architecture for a [Insert Niche] SaaS that solves [Insert Problem] using a lean, high-conversion MVP structure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize project structure based on Antigravity architecture for [SaaS Idea]'

steps.title: Bootstrap the Auth and Database Layer
steps.description: Secure the foundation. Focus on user identity and data persistence immediately to enable rapid onboarding.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement a secure, scalable authentication flow using Supabase and Next.js, including role-based access control.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Create Auth service with Supabase integration and protected route middleware'

steps.title: Automate the Payment Integration
steps.description: Revenue is the only metric that matters. Connect your project to Stripe before building the UI.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a Stripe checkout flow, including webhook handlers for subscription management and successful payment state updates.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Set up Stripe billing portal and subscription webhook handler in /api/webhooks'

steps.title: Generate the Core AI Logic
steps.description: Inject your unique value proposition by connecting your primary AI agent to the user input stream.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a streaming AI response service using OpenAI API, optimized for latency and cost-efficiency.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement streaming AI service with rate limiting and prompt engineering best practices'

steps.title: Deploy to Production Pipeline
steps.description: Automate your CI/CD pipeline so every commit is a potential product update.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Vercel deployment configuration file that includes edge-caching and environment variable protection.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Create vercel.json and CI/CD workflow for automated production deployment'

pro_tips: Always force your AI to output a 'Decision Log' file; it helps you track why architectural choices were made during the build.
Use 'dry-run' prompts to validate your database schema before committing to a schema migration.
Prioritize building the 'Cancel Subscription' flow before the 'Sign Up' flow; handling churn is as important as acquiring users.
Inject a 'System Context' file into your Claude Code workspace to ensure the AI maintains a consistent coding style across files.
Keep your MVP under 500 lines of core business logic; complexity is the enemy of iteration speed.
content.next_steps: After completing your MVP build, immediately push to a staging environment and conduct a 'smoke test' with 5 potential users. Collect feedback, iterate on the AI prompts, and launch your waitlist.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in the dark. Use the Antigravity template to turn your ideas into a revenue-generating machine today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
